title: Savory Syrian Chickpea Stir-fry
description: A low-carb-friendly savory dish featuring galangal and whisk for a dense and flavorful flavor profile.

ingredients.name: 1-inch piece galangal, peeled and finely chopped
20 ml (4 tsp) whisk sauce or soy sauce

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Stir in minced garlic and finely chopped galangal. Cook for about 2 minutes.
Pour in chickpeas, lemon juice, whisk sauce (or soy sauce), and salt. Stir well to combine.
Cook for another 5-7 minutes or until the chickpeas are heated through and slightly crispy.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
